'''kasata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feare|feare]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feare|feare]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kasata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæsætæth|kæsætæth]] || [[word:kæsætæj|kæsætæj]] || [[word:kæsætæsh|kæsætæsh]] || [[word:kæsætæ|kæsætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kasasatath|kasasatath]] || [[word:kasasataj|kasasataj]] || [[word:kasasatash|kasasatash]] || [[word:kasasata|kasasata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kasatath|kasatath]] || [[word:kasataj|kasataj]] || [[word:kasatash|kasatash]] || [[word:kasata|kasata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kasaftafth|kasaftafth]] || [[word:kasaftafj|kasaftafj]] || [[word:kasaftafsh|kasaftafsh]] || [[word:kasaftaf|kasaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kasatatha|kasatatha]] || [[word:kasataja|kasataja]] || [[word:kasatasha|kasatasha]] || [[word:kasataka|kasataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kasatath|kasatath]] || [[word:kasataj|kasataj]] || [[word:kasatash|kasatash]] || [[word:kasata|kasata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kasatathal|kasatathal]] || [[word:kasatajal|kasatajal]] || [[word:kasatashal|kasatashal]] || [[word:kasatakal|kasatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kasataathatha|kasataathatha]] || [[word:kasataajaja|kasataajaja]] || [[word:kasataashasha|kasataashasha]] || [[word:kasataaka|kasataaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kasatathan|kasatathan]] || [[word:kasatajan|kasatajan]] || [[word:kasatashan|kasatashan]] || [[word:kasatakan|kasatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kasatathaoro|kasatathaoro]] || [[word:kasatajaoro|kasatajaoro]] || [[word:kasatashaoro|kasatashaoro]] || [[word:kasatakaoro|kasatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
